calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo and CSR: Brenda Fields.
Francisco torres Esq. for Plaintiff Joe Lee. Elizabeth Falk, Esq. for Defendant Roayal Edwards also present. Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation. Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows: Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at 923 Hayes St., San Francisco. Forfeiture of the rental agreement, Defendant to vacate the premises by 8-31-03 in clean and damage free condition and free of all debris. If defendant complies with terms, Plaintiff waive all past due rent throgh 8-31-03. Security deposti shall be retained by Plaintiff and will pay relocation expenses in the amount of $12,000.00 to defendant, with first payment of $6,000.00 within 2 business days after this agreement has been approved by the court, the final payment of $6,000.00 will be made within three business days after surender of possession of the premises and dismissal of the action with prejudice. If Defendant fail to do so, Plaintiff may so state by EX PARTE declaration, with 24 hours notice to defendant's attorney and have judgment entered. Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside, vacate any judgment, stay of execution or relief from forfeiture. Each party waives any claim against the other and generally releases the other from all claims. Defendant represents that there is no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Each side will bear its own costs and attorney fees. Parties agreed to terms, Plaintiff's attorney to reduced to writting. The Court deemed matter settled, trial date vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-21-2003 Continued To Jun-30-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2003 Continued To Jun-24-03 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 218
